description:
No spec subject

From critical review of specled_-155 branch (consolidated report: ~/vaults/rmbrs-vault/code_review/critical/specled_ex/2026-07-23/specled_-155-aggregate-first-spec-coverage/20260723-161424-consolidated.md, review_commit af16144; finding TEST-M1).

.github/workflows/specs.yml runs ONLY 'bash ./scripts/check_specs.sh' (mix spec.check) — never mix test — on a single OTP version. Consequences: (1) the 13 new coverage test files from epic specled_-155 never execute in CI; (2) the test_coverage threshold: 90 gate in mix.exs:10 is configured but exercised by no pipeline; (3) the :classic (pre-OTP-27) runtime-selection branch of SpecLedEx.Coverage.Snapshot is never exercised anywhere in CI.

Fix: add a test job to specs.yml running 'mix test' at minimum. Decisions to make at implementation: (a) plain 'mix test' vs 'mix test --cover' (arming the 90% gate may fail the build until true coverage is measured — depends on specled_-aav landing first if --cover); (b) whether to add an OTP <27 matrix leg to exercise the classic snapshot fallback. Blocked-by relationship to specled_-aav only if --cover is chosen.

comments.text:
ADMISSION (specled_-155 epic policy):
Allowed touches: .github/workflows/specs.yml
Out of Scope (files): lib/**, test/**, test_support/**, .spec/**, priv/**, mix.exs
Out of Scope (intent): no new deps; no --cover arming (83.05% measured < 90% threshold — deferred to specled_-6v6); no changes to the existing check job's behavior beyond shared paths filter
Verification: (1) workflow YAML parses; (2) the exact CI command 'mix test --include integration' runs green locally on the native-path OTP (28.x); (3) mix spec.check --base specled_-155/aggregate-first-spec-coverage exit 0. The OTP 26 classic-fallback leg is provable only in CI (single local OTP) — first real proof is the epic PR's own workflow run.

DECISIONS (per ticket): (a) plain 'mix test --include integration', NOT --cover — measured true coverage 83.05% @ bef5400 plus the snapshot fixture-module cover leak (HTML crash + masked exit code) make arming the gate a follow-up: specled_-6v6. (b) OTP <27 matrix leg INCLUDED: Elixir 1.18.4 / OTP 26.2.5 exercises Snapshot.runtime_mode/0's :classic branch. Also fixed latent gap: workflow paths filters lacked test/**, test_support/**, priv/** — test-only changes previously didn't trigger CI at all.

OTP 26 classic leg is CI-provable only (single local OTP) — first proof is the epic PR's workflow run

This closes review finding TEST-M1's actionable core: the suite now runs in CI on both snapshot engine paths.

APPROVED. Merged 757f7b8 into specled_-155/aggregate-first-spec-coverage via --ff-only (epic now at 757f7b8); make smoke green; stage worktree specled_ex-ci-test-job cleaned up. Closing per auto-audit sign-off.

title: CI never runs mix test — wire test job (decide plain vs --cover) into specs.yml
